snippet.title: Apex Legends Chaos Theory Collection Event Trailer
snippet.description:
Beat the heat in the Chaos Theory Collection Event!  Ring Flares are everywhere in Ring Fury Takeover and Caustic's plotting something in his Town Takeover. Plus collect 24 fearsome items!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie is back to shake things up and this time she has sabotaged the Ring. Ring flares are now showing up across the Apex Games in the new Ring Fury Takeover. But don't fret - you'll drop in with the new Heat Shield in your Survival inventory slot so you can withstand Ring damage and recover with your squad. Become a test subject in a twisted experiment and brave the gas for gold-tier loot in Caustic's Town Takeover. Earn free rewards throughout the event and shop for 24 limited-time event items. Get all 24 event items and receive Bangalore's "Cold Steel" Heirloom. Ready to embrace the chaos?

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬Æ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Origin and Steam.  Apex Legends is also coming to the Nintendo Switch on March 9, 2021. 

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 ‚Äì Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#ChaosTheory #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

en.title: Apex Legends Chaos Theory Collection Event Trailer
en.description:
Beat the heat in the Chaos Theory Collection Event!  Ring Flares are everywhere in Ring Fury Takeover and Caustic's plotting something in his Town Takeover. Plus collect 24 fearsome items!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie is back to shake things up and this time she has sabotaged the Ring. Ring flares are now showing up across the Apex Games in the new Ring Fury Takeover. But don't fret - you'll drop in with the new Heat Shield in your Survival inventory slot so you can withstand Ring damage and recover with your squad. Become a test subject in a twisted experiment and brave the gas for gold-tier loot in Caustic's Town Takeover. Earn free rewards throughout the event and shop for 24 limited-time event items. Get all 24 event items and receive Bangalore's "Cold Steel" Heirloom. Ready to embrace the chaos?

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. #BrunoMars #AndersonPaak #SilkSonic #LeaveTheDoorOpen

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) ‚Äì our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX‚Äôs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äì approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.description:
‚≠êCompras RARAS de FACEBOOK! - Lo que COMPRE vs Lo que RECIBI üí∏ Expectativa vs Realidad - Hellomaphie

Hola yo soy Maphie y en el video de hoy vamos a abrir paquetes misteriosos de articulos que compre por culpa de Facebook.

No se si a ustedes tambien les pasa pero en mi feed de facebook me aparecen anuncios o Ads de cosas super cool y divertidas que siempre me hacen querer comprarlas al instante, asi que en el video de hoy decidi poner a prueba estos productos para ver si funcionan o no, es tipo como los videos que hemos hecho de barato vs caro donde comparamos articulos para ver cual vale la pena comprar.

Algunos de los articulos que vamos a abrir el dia de hoy son Pokemon Noodles o Pikachu noodles que es una sopa instantanea con Pikachus comestibles muy kawaii, tambien pedi funda para airpods de silicon con forma de Among Us, Dispensador de jabon con forma de Mickey Mouse, la subscripcion de Kawaii Box que es una caja sorpresa con utiles escolares y accesorios Kawaii, Plumas de gel con efecto 3d Jelly Poptides, Funda de iPhone con consola retro que si funciona y mas cosas super cool y divertidas!

snippet.title: Dani - Detr√°s De Lo Caro (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Escuch√° ‚ÄúDetr√°s De Lo Caro‚Äù en Spotify:
 https://open.spotify.com/track/3hTM58fQirofkXiNRIX5L5?si=4IU-kPQsT26JrhMg1fo51g

Segu√≠ a Dani en redes:

 https://www.twitter.com/danielribba

Lyrics: 
Desde que empec√© est√°n pendientes 
Si lo hago bien o lo hago mal 
Pero que bien se siente caerse y volverlo a intentar 

Hasta el que mas dijo que era for real cambi√≥ 
Hasta el que menos se la vio le cabi√≥ 
Ellos se la pasan pendiente a m√≠
mientras yo me la paso tumbao‚Äô
tirando free en el sill√≥n

Ya se sabe cual es mi lugar 
Y al que no le caiga bien me va a tener que tragar 
Esa trama la conozco de principio a final 
Y este juego no esta hecho pa‚Äô mi dificultad 

Ahora estoy en la grasa 
Dani tiene el OK en la plaza 
No puedo evitar cantar pa‚Äô las masas 
Pero puedo hacer que se cuestionen lo que pasa 

Desde que empec√© est√°n pendientes 
Si lo hago bien o lo hago mal 
Pero que bien se siente caerse y volver a intentar 
A golpes me hice fuerte, aunque me cueste diferenciar 
Si ese golpe corriente ,  otra vez es ansiedad 

Ya estoy acostumbrado, a que tiren beef y despu√©s miren pal costado
eso no es na‚Äô nuevo hacen todo por dinero 
detr√°s de lo caro est√° la otra cara de la moneda que no conocemos  
este mundo es un pa√±uelo 
Y a quien ignoraste cuando estabas subiendo te lo vas a volver a encontrar cuando toques el suelo 
G√°nense el respeto que es probable que sea lo √∫nico que nos llevemos 

Ahora estoy en la grasa 
Dani tiene el OK en la plaza 
No puedo evitar cantar pa‚Äô las masas 
Pero puedo hacer que se cuestionen lo que pasa 

Y si cuento hasta tres...
Me suelto un ritmo 
Y lo pongo a romper 
Les falta nafta pa‚Äô quererme correr 
Ustedes yendo y ya estoy por volver 
Con el mundo a mis pies 

Gracias a dios 
A m√≠ nunca me import√≥ lo que digan 
ese es el secreto pa‚Äô llegar arriba 
Cada vez hay mas gente que nos mira 
Y la realidad es m√°s grande que la expectativa 

Mientras ustedes hablan mentiras
yo soy el protagonista de las historias que narro
ac√° las palabras duelen mas que los disparos por eso en barras descargo 

Ahora estoy en la grasa 
Dani tiene el OK en la plaza 
No puedo evitar cantar pa‚Äô las masas 
Pero puedo hacer que se cuestionen lo que pasa 

Ahora estoy en la grasa

Bienvenidos a Caracas, Venezuela.

Pero realmente hablar de Venezuela es mucho m√°s complejo que eso‚Ä¶ Y para que ustedes y yo podamos disfrutar juntos y entender mucho mejor toda mi aventura‚Ä¶ Lo que viv√≠, lo que sufr√≠ y lo que disfrut√© en Venezuela, es preciso comenzar a contar esta historia‚Ä¶ por el principio‚Ä¶ Por el inicio de lo que hoy conocemos como Venezuela.¬Ý

snippet.title: Un enorme iceberg, del doble del tama√±o de Madrid, se desprende de la Ant√°rtida
snippet.description:
Un enorme pedazo de hielo de 1.270 kil√≥metros cuadrados ‚Äìaproximadamente el doble del tama√±o de Madrid‚Äì se ha desprendido de la Ant√°rtida.

El iceberg se separ√≥ el 26 de febrero de la plataforma de hielo Brunt, ubicada en el mar de Weddell, en el sur del oc√©ano Atl√°ntico, donde se encuentra la estaci√≥n de investigaci√≥n Halley, que actualmente permanece cerrada debido a las temperaturas extremas, por debajo de los -50 ¬∞C.

El primer indicio de que ese desprendimiento era inminente lleg√≥ en noviembre del 2020, cuando una nueva grieta, llamada 'North Rift', se dirigi√≥ hacia otra gran fractura cerca del glaciar Stancomb-Wills, a 35 kil√≥metros de distancia. Durante todo el mes, esta brecha estuvo desplaz√°ndose hacia el noreste a una velocidad de hasta 1 kil√≥metro al d√≠a, atravesando la plataforma de hielo flotante de 150 metros de espesor. El nuevo iceberg se form√≥ cuando la grieta se ensanch√≥ varios centenares de metros en pocas horas la ma√±ana del 26 de febrero, desprendi√©ndose del resto.

Agradecimiento especial al barrio Cerro De Los Leones, Guanajuato.

‚áÅ ‚ÄúEsta Noche‚Äù 
Santa Cumbia es un proyecto que muestra la combinaci√≥n de un ‚Äúantes‚Äù y un ‚Äúdespu√©s‚Äù en la carrera de Santa Fe Klan sin dejar fuera todos los elementos y aprendizajes que ha tenido a trav√©s de los a√±os. Este √°lbum es una mezcla √∫nica entre la vida loca y la dura realidad cotidiana. 

‚áÅ ‚ÄúEsta Noche‚Äù 
Santa Cumbia shows the combination of "before" and an "after" in Santa Fe Klan¬¥s career without leaving out all the elements and lessons learned through the years. This album is a unique mix between the crazy life and harsh reality.

snippet.title: State of Play | February 25, 2021 [ENGLISH]
snippet.description:
Rated RP - T, THIS LIVE STREAM MAY INCLUDE CONTENT INAPPROPRIATE FOR CHILDREN
 
This Thursday, State of Play will serve up new updates and deep dives for 10 games coming to PS4 and PS5. The show is clocking it at 30 minutes or so, give or take.
Get ready for new game announcements and updates on some of the third-party and indie titles you last saw in June‚Äôs PS5 showcase.
 
And a quick note: there won‚Äôt be PlayStation hardware or business-focused updates in this show. We‚Äôre focusing on great games set to come out in the months ahead.
 
Be sure to tune in on Thursday, February 25 at 2:00pm Pacific Time / 5:00pm Eastern Time / 10:00pm GMT!

en.title: 1 million subscribers special | 195 countries in 22 minutes
en.description:
To celebrate our first million subscribers we proposed a special video: a tour of all the independent states of the planet.

Geography records, history lessons, sports brands, cultural achievements. Each country has something to highlight. What is the country with the most Olympic medals per capita on the planet? How many countries in the world are smaller than Mexico City? What do Micronesia and Gabon have in common? And Iceland and Paraguay?

Do not miss this tour around the world in the style of Un Mundo Inmenso

We also share this video from @Wendover Productions, in which we are inspired to do it with our imprint: https://youtu.be/P-b4SUOfn_4

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover‚Äôs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech
